    <title>Elevated errors on Haiku 4.5</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>23</var>, <var data-var='time'>00:10</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This incident has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>23:52</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>

  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30964135</id>
    <published>2026-07-22T21:12:51Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-22T21:12:51Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/yc7mr2gvl914"/>
    <title>Microsoft Office add-in availability</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>17:56</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - Users who installed the following add-ins may experience issues accessing the add-in functionality: Claude by Anthropic for PowerPoint, Claude by Anthropic for Word, and Claude by Anthropic for Excel. <br /><br />To regain immediate access to Claude for Microsoft 365, install the add-in here: https://marketplace.microsoft.com/en-us/product/office/wa200010725 </p></content>
  </entry>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30963939</id>

    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/ng5shnqxj1r7"/>
    <title>Service disruption on Claude Services</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>17:45</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This incident has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>17:28</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>17:27</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are investigating an outage affecting features such as document creation in claude.ai, Cowork Remote, Claude Code, Claude Code on the Web, Claude Tag, and Claude Design </p></content>
  </entry>
